title: rubus stereacanthoides
intro: Rubus stereacanthoides, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus stereacanthoides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
